<!--
PR title must follow Conventional Commits format: type(scope): subject
Scope is optional and subject must start with a lowercase letter.

Examples:
  feat(cli): add recovered AST dump
  fix(ast): recover missing identifier nodes
  docs: update contributor guide
  chore(deps): bump golang.org/x/tools

See CONTRIBUTING.md for the full commit message guidelines.
-->

## Purpose
> Briefly describe the problem or need driving this PR and how it resolves the issue. Include links to related issues if applicable.

Fixes #<Issue Number>

## Approach
> Summarize the solution and implementation details.

## Checklist
- [ ] Read the [Contributing Guide](CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] Added or updated [corpus tests](AGENTS.md#corpus-tests)

## Remarks
> Add any additional context, known issues, or TODOs related to this PR.
